utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5. For each: (1) health_coverage—both physical and mental health insurance are specified with costs, fully detailed; (2) property_coverage—listed with plan name and cost, complete; (3) travel_coverage—listed with plan name and cost, complete; (4) additional_services—three services are specified, two of which do not have explicit costs but are described as included in other plans, so cost information is implicit but still described as covered, thus considered sufficiently specified; (5) total_budget—includes both monthly and annual cost breakdowns. All items are present and reasonably complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists the following items: (1) physical_health_insurance and mental_health_insurance both as 'Value-Oriented Comprehensive Portfolio' – this name does not directly appear in the ground-truth ratings, but the closest match based on structure and naming convention would be the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (as the ideal_insurance_profile also lists LifeFirst as both physical and mental health coverage). (2) Property_coverage is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan03' – this is most likely a variant of 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' from the property_protection section. (3) Travel_coverage is 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage1' – this resembles 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under travel_insurance. (4) Telemedicine_emergency_support is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan20' – this links to 'Telemedicine Services' in health_enhancement_services. (5) Adventure_travel_addon and specialized_rescue_services are included in 'TravelFirst Standard Plan7' features, which aligns with 'TravelFirst Standard Plan' in travel_insurance and 'Adventure Travel Coverage' in travel_enhancement_services. Therefore, we map: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical and mental health) → 9 and 9, LifeFirst Standard Coverage → 9, InsurePlus Standard Plan → 10, Telemedicine Services → 8, TravelFirst Standard Plan → 9, Adventure Travel Coverage → 10.
